ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of size standard (e.g., International, Regional, Custom) */,
  "standard_region" TEXT /* Region where the size standard is commonly used (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., shirts, pants, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing category is designed (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season(s) in which the clothing category is typically worn (e.g., Summer, Winter, All Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL) */,
  "chest_min" REAL /* Minimum chest measurement */,
  "chest_max" REAL /* Maximum chest measurement */,
  "neck_min" REAL /* Minimum neck measurement */,
  "neck_max" REAL /* Maximum neck measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length */,
  "shoulder_min" REAL /* Minimum shoulder measurement */,
  "shoulder_max" REAL /* Maximum shoulder measurement */,
  "hip_min" REAL /* Minimum hip measurement */,
  "hip_max" REAL /* Maximum hip measurement */,
  "thigh_min" REAL /* Minimum thigh measurement */,
  "thigh_max" REAL /* Maximum thigh measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_entries_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_entries_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse or store location where the inventory is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reorder was placed for this inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product (e.g., Cotton, Polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season(s) in which the product is available (e.g., Summer, Winter, All Year) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Customer's preferred brand */,
  "preferred_color" TEXT /* Customer's preferred color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size code */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the size recommendation (e.g., 0.85) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_profiles ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_profiles ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price of the item after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code of the item */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for fit (1-5) */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for overall satisfaction (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer comments */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return if the product was returned (e.g., Wrong Size, Damaged) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Returned, Pending, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_profiles ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
